scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@paw/service && npm run build --workspace=@paw/web && npm run build --workspace=@paw/tray && npm run build --workspace=@paw/cli
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p apps/service/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/tray/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
